# Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature (`feature/`)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (lint, format, types, tests)
- [ ] Rust: `cargo test` and `cargo clippy` pass (if applicable)
- [ ] New i18n keys added to all 3 locales (en, ru, pl)
- [ ] PR targets `develop` (not `main`)

Closes #
